reviews.review_description: Trust me I ment the owner tho he tried to give me 2,000 lemons

The game wasn’t amazing I mean the model was funny but… two right hands? And those big airballons in my face 😭 don’t get me wrong though it was enjoyable the map was big but very open I feel like the backrooms is meant to make you claustrophobic but it was way too open. The jumpscare was okay and even though there was no objective it was quite enjoyable! 

Ps: I reviewed this for a video @coco3brits check it out in a few days when it’s released to see have a great day!
